66.question: Write an email to a foreign teacher about the causes and effects of study pressure and suggest ways to relieve it.
66.rubric: Total score: 15. Award higher scores for complete coverage of causes/effects and relief methods, clear organization, appropriate email format, accurate grammar, varied vocabulary, and effective cohesion. Tier 5: 13-15, Tier 4: 10-12, Tier 3: 7-9, Tier 2: 4-6, Tier 1: 1-3, Tier 0: 0.
66.reference_answer: A strong response explains at least one cause and effect of study pressure and gives practical relief methods in coherent email form.
66.reference_analysis: Check task completion first, then language accuracy, cohesion, and communicative effectiveness.
